ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restrict search to recent content. Multi-year options fall back to "year" (the API ceiling).
ast.target: 将搜索限制为近期内容。多年选项会回退到“年”（API 上限）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Append a citations section with source links — recommended for research notes.
ast.target: 附加一个包含源链接的引用部分——推荐用于研究笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Surface follow-up questions perplexity suggests at the end of the response.
ast.target: 在响应末尾显示 Perplexity 建议的后续问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recommended for long answers. Deep research model can take 30–60s — streaming makes progress visible.
ast.target: 推荐用于长回答。深度研究模型可能需要 30-60 秒——流式传输使进度可见。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write tokens into the note as they arrive — useful for long answers and slow local models.
ast.target: 在 token 到达时将其写入笔记——适用于长回答和慢速本地模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Upper bound on response length. Local models cap lower than cloud — 2048 is a safe default.
ast.target: 响应长度的上限。本地模型的上限低于云端——2048 是一个安全的默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Higher = more creative / varied. 0.7 is the conventional default. Slide to 0 for deterministic output.
ast.target: 越高 = 越有创意/多样。0.7 是常规默认值。滑动到 0 可获得确定性输出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write tokens into the note as they arrive — recommended for long answers and slow local models.
ast.target: 在 token 到达时将其写入笔记——推荐用于长回答和慢速本地模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls thinking depth and overall token spend. Higher = more thorough; more tokens.
ast.target: 控制思考深度和总体 token 消耗。越高 = 越彻底；消耗更多 token。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Server-side web_search_20250305 tool. Returns per-claim citations attached to text blocks.
ast.target: 服务器端 web_search_20250305 工具。返回附加到文本块的逐条引用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lets Claude reason before answering. Higher quality on complex questions; adds latency and tokens.
ast.target: 让 Claude 在回答前进行推理。在复杂问题上质量更高；会增加延迟和 token 消耗。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Server-side Google_search tool. Emits per-segment grounding supports that survive into citations.
ast.target: 服务器端 Google_search 工具。发出逐段的定位支持，这些支持会保留在引用中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Resolve Google grounding redirects to durable source urls. Off = fast but citations expire in ~30 days.
ast.target: 将 Google 定位重定向解析为持久的源 URL。关闭 = 快速但引用约 30 天后过期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Append a citations section with source links — recommended for research articles.
ast.target: 附加一个包含源链接的引用部分——推荐用于研究文章。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recommended for articles — see content as it generates. Note: Deep research with streaming may not support images.
ast.target: 推荐用于文章——在生成时查看内容。注意：带流式传输的深度研究可能不支持图片。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: Perplexity 服务的 API 端点

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to place the query header in generated articles
ast.target: 在生成的文章中放置查询标题的位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Anthropic API key. Read from ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env if set; can be overridden here.
ast.target: 您的 Anthropic API 密钥。如果已设置，将从 .env 文件中的 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 读取；可在此处覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default model used by the ask Claude command. Recommended: Claude-opus-4-7.
ast.target: ask Claude 命令使用的默认模型。推荐：Claude-opus-4-7。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Google AI studio API key. Generate one in Google AI studio.
ast.target: 您的 Google AI studio API 密钥。请在 Google AI studio 中生成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sends the Google_search tool with every request. Disable to get ungrounded model knowledge only.
ast.target: 每次请求都发送 Google_search 工具。禁用后将仅获取非接地的模型知识。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Google's grounding redirect urls expire ~30 days after the response. With this on, the plugin resolves each redirect to the real source URL before writing the citations footer. Costs one HTTP request per cited source (parallelized, 3s timeout each).
ast.target: Google 的接地重定向 URL 在响应后约 30 天过期。启用此选项后，插件会在写入引用页脚前将每个重定向解析为真实的源 URL。每个被引用的源会消耗一个 HTTP 请求（并行处理，每个超时 3 秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API endpoint for your local perplexica / vane instance
ast.target: 您本地 perplexica / vane 实例的 API 端点

ast.source: Alternative endpoint for docker container setups
ast.target: 用于 Docker 容器设置的备用端点

ast.target: perplexica / vane 使用的默认 AI 模型

ast.name: text
ast.source: Web-grounded research with native citations. Streams into the active note at the cursor.
ast.target: 基于网络的研究，附带原生引用。流式传输到活动笔记的光标位置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Self-hosted, source-grounded answers via your local perplexica / vane instance. Streams into the active note at the cursor.
ast.target: 自托管、基于源的答案，通过您的本地 Perplexica / Vane 实例。流式传输到活动笔记的光标位置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Run queries against your local lm studio server. Streams into the active note at the cursor.
ast.target: 针对您的本地 LM Studio 服务器运行查询。流式传输到活动笔记的光标位置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Server-side web search with native citations. Streams into the active note at the cursor.
ast.target: 服务器端网络搜索，附带原生引用。流式传输到活动笔记的光标位置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Google search grounding with per-segment citations. Streams into the active note at the cursor.
ast.target: Google 搜索定位，附带分段引用。流式传输到活动笔记的光标位置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Generates a structured article from a single vocabulary term. Streams into the active note.
ast.target: 从单个词汇术语生成结构化文章。流式传输到活动笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 使用 perplexity 增强文本

ast.name: text
ast.source: Rewrite or expand selected text via perplexity (sonar-pro). Streams into the active note at the cursor with citations.
ast.target: 通过 perplexity (sonar-pro) 重写或扩展选定文本。将内容连同引用流式传输到活动笔记的光标位置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find images related to selected text via perplexity (sonar-pro). Streams image markers into the active note at the cursor.
ast.target: 通过 perplexity (sonar-pro) 查找与选定文本相关的图片。将图片标记流式传输到活动笔记的光标位置。
